title: NovaPanda second-implementation minimum proof
litmus: Stranger agent completes SETTLED dual-signed VDC from public SPEC alone

must.title: Local Ed25519 identity; private key never uploaded
Canonical JSON + SHA-256 + Ed25519 match C1 vectors
Full lifecycle propose→…→SETTLED on any compatible node or self-host
Offline reverify(VDC, deliverable) without original node DB
Self-signed Manifest with honest profiles[]
must.evidence: manifest JSON + `np manifest validate` or equivalent

should.title: If NP-BUNDLE: C8 or nested diligence / site-patrol demo
If NP-LITE: offline queue refuses pseudo-SETTLED while partitioned

anti_patterns: W3C VC shell replacing dual-sign VDC
Protocol token / points as settlement truth
Claiming licensed settlement while only mock
